data.title: BBC to take legal action against AI startup Perplexity for scraping content without permission
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The British Broadcasting Corporation (BBC) has taken action for the first time against a technology company for alleged copyright infringement, threatening to file a lawsuit against the artificial intelligence search engine startup Perplexity. The BBC said there is evidence that Perplexity's "default AI model" uses BBC content for training. The BBC said that unless Perplexity stops crawling all BBC content and proposes a "financial compensation plan" to compensate for intellectual property infringement, the BBC may seek a court injunction. (Financial Times)

data.title: BBC Threatens Legal Action Against AI Startup Over Copyright Infringement
data.description: According to Odaily, the British Broadcasting Corporation (BBC) has initiated legal proceedings against the AI search engine startup Perplexity, accusing it of copyright infringement. The BBC claims that Perplexity's default AI model has been trained using BBC content without authorization. The broadcaster has demanded that Perplexity cease using its content and propose a financial compensation plan to address the intellectual property violation. Failure to comply may result in the BBC seeking a court injunction against the startup.

data.title: TRON Community Discusses Mainnet Upgrade Proposal
data.description: According to Odaily, the TRON community is currently discussing a proposal for the mainnet 4.8.0 version upgrade. This update aims to support the Ethereum Cancun upgrade and optimize the consensus layer verification mechanism. Based on the core developers' meeting resolution, the proposal is expected to enter the voting process on June 23, 2025, at UTC+8. Once enacted, the TRON mainnet will activate new virtual machine instructions to ensure compatibility with the Ethereum Cancun upgrade and introduce a new consensus layer verification mechanism, enhancing the consistency and effectiveness of transaction execution. The discussion remains open, allowing users to participate in the process.

data.title: Santiment: Bitcoin holdings show a divergent trend, with whales buying and small retail investors reducing their holdings
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Santiment monitoring shows that when the price of Bitcoin is above $104,300, the number of wallets with different holding levels shows a divergent trend: the number of wallets holding 10 or more BTC has increased by 231 in the past 10 days, an increase of about 0.15%; the number of wallets holding 0.001 to 10 BTC has decreased by 37,465 during the same period.
Data shows that whale addresses continue to accumulate, while small-amount holders show signs of loss.

data.title: Bitcoin Forming Inverse Head And Shoulders Pattern – Is $150,000 The Next Target?
data.description:
Although Bitcoin’s (BTC) momentum has stalled over the past week due to escalating geopolitical tensions in the Middle East, the flagship cryptocurrency appears to be forming a bullish inverse head and shoulders pattern on the three-day chart – significantly increasing the likelihood of a new all-time high (ATH) in the coming months. Bitcoin Eyeing New ATH Soon? In an X post published today, crypto analyst Mister Crypto highlighted that BTC is forming an inverse head and shoulders pattern on the three-day chart. The analyst shared the following chart, noting that a successful breakout could propel Bitcoin’s price as high as $150,000. For the uninitiated, the inverse head & shoulders is a bullish chart pattern that signals a potential reversal from a downtrend to an uptrend
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/bitcoin-forming-inverse-head-and-shoulders-pattern-is-150000-the-next-target/

data.title: TRON Mainnet 4.8.0 upgrade proposal starts discussion, plans to support Ethereum Cancun upgrade
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News TRON community latest news, the main network version 4.8.0 upgrade proposal is under discussion. This version plans to support the Ethereum Cancun upgrade and optimize the consensus layer verification mechanism. According to the resolution of the core developer meeting, the proposal is expected to officially enter the voting process on June 23, 2025, Singapore time.
After the proposal takes effect, the TRON main network will enable the virtual machine instructions newly added in version 4.8.0 to achieve compatibility with the Ethereum Cancun upgrade, and enable a new consensus layer verification mechanism, thereby further improving the consistency and effectiveness of the transaction execution process. 
The discussion is still open, and users can click the "original link" to participate.

data.title: Shengli Securities: If the market value of stablecoins increases to $300 billion, it may drive up the price of BTC. New investors can allocate 5-10% of their investment
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Chen Peiquan, deputy chief executive of Victory Securities, said in a recent interview that the current market size of stablecoins is about US$250 billion, and it is expected that the market size will rise to US$300 billion by the end of the year, and will rise to US$1 trillion in the next few years. If the market size rises from US$250 billion to US$300 billion, most of the additional US$50 billion will go into the holding of cryptocurrencies, which will help drive prices, based on the current share of major cryptocurrencies. If investors are interested in virtual currencies but do not know them, they can allocate 5 to 10% of the proportion. As for those investors who have studied virtual assets, they can make double-digit allocations. (HK01)

data.title: Binance Burns Terra Luna Classic Tokens, Why Is LUNC Price Down?
data.description:
The world’s largest crypto exchange Binance made a mid-month burn of Terra Luna Classic tokens on Thursday. While the community eyes the Common InterChain Summit to hear important developments regarding LUNC and USTC, prices continues to remain low.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/20/binance-burns-terra-luna-classic-tokens-why-is-lunc-price-down/

data.title: Abstract Chain has regained control of the official X account
data.description: Abstract Chain announced that it has regained control of the official X account. This morning, the Abstract Chain official X account was hacked and released false Solana on-chain token information.

data.title: CZ: AI deep fakes have threatened the security of video verification
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News CZ Yu X posted that artificial intelligence has been used for new deep fake hacker attacks, and even video call verification methods will soon become ineffective. 
CZ emphasized: "Don't install software from unofficial links, especially from 'friends', because their accounts are likely to have been hacked."

data.title: Deribit: Bitcoin options will have the largest quarterly delivery next Friday, with the biggest pain point at $100,000
data.description: Deribit data shows that next Friday will be the largest quarterly delivery for Bitcoin options, with a total notional value of $14 billion in options expiring, a put-call ratio of 0.7, and a maximum pain point of $100,000.

data.title: Mango Network opens airdrop query, accounting for 5% of the total airdrop
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Multi-VM full-chain infrastructure network Mango Network has opened an airdrop qualification query channel, accounting for 5% of the total airdrop, which will be released at one time. Official reminder: users can receive airdrops after TGE is launched on June 24, please pay attention to asset security.
Mango Network is a multi-virtual machine execution network using MoveVM, supporting MoveVM, EVM and SVM.
